snippet.title: State of Play | February 25, 2021 [ENGLISH]
snippet.description:
Rated RP - T, THIS LIVE STREAM MAY INCLUDE CONTENT INAPPROPRIATE FOR CHILDREN
 
This Thursday, State of Play will serve up new updates and deep dives for 10 games coming to PS4 and PS5. The show is clocking it at 30 minutes or so, give or take.
Get ready for new game announcements and updates on some of the third-party and indie titles you last saw in Juneâ€™s PS5 showcase.
 
And a quick note: there wonâ€™t be PlayStation hardware or business-focused updates in this show. Weâ€™re focusing on great games set to come out in the months ahead.
 
Be sure to tune in on Thursday, February 25 at 2:00pm Pacific Time / 5:00pm Eastern Time / 10:00pm GMT!


#StateofPlay #PS5 #PlayStation

en.title: 1 million subscribers special | 195 countries in 22 minutes
en.description:
To celebrate our first million subscribers we proposed a special video: a tour of all the independent states of the planet.

Geography records, history lessons, sports brands, cultural achievements. Each country has something to highlight. What is the country with the most Olympic medals per capita on the planet? How many countries in the world are smaller than Mexico City? What do Micronesia and Gabon have in common? And Iceland and Paraguay?

Do not miss this tour around the world in the style of Un Mundo Inmenso

We also share this video from @Wendover Productions, in which we are inspired to do it with our imprint: https://youtu.be/P-b4SUOfn_4

snippet.title: Perseverance Roverâ€™s Descent and Touchdown on Mars (Official NASA Video)
snippet.description:
NASA's Mars 2020 Perseverance mission captured thrilling footage of its rover landing in Mars' Jezero Crater on Feb. 18, 2021.  The real footage in this video was captured by several cameras that are part of the rover's entry, descent, and landing suite. The views include a camera looking down from the spacecraft's descent stage (a kind of rocket-powered jet pack that helps fly the rover to its landing site), a camera on the rover looking up at the descent stage, a camera on the top of the aeroshell (a capsule protecting the rover) looking up at that parachute, and a camera on the bottom of the rover looking down at the Martian surface.
 
The audio embedded in the video comes from the mission control call-outs during entry, descent, and landing. 
 
For more information about Perseverance, visit https://mars.nasa.gov/perseverance
 
Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech

snippet.title: Por quأ© los perros se muerden la boca cuando juegan
snippet.description:
Asأ­ que llevas a tu compaأ±ero canino al parque para perros. Conoce a un nuevo amigo y empiezan a jugar juntos. El movimiento pacأ­fico de la cola rأ،pidamente se convierte en un mordisco entre sأ­. آ،Para tu horror, te das cuenta de que ambos van por la cara y el cuello del otro! ًںک§ 

آ،No te preocupes! Los perros se muerden naturalmente entre sأ­ cuando juegan en un juego llamado lucha con la boca o lucha con la mandأ­bula. Es una forma totalmente sana tanto de perros como de gatos para interactuar con sus amigos. آ،Pero hay seأ±ales de advertencia que debes tener en cuenta cuando el juego de los perros se vuelve demasiado duro para su comodidad! 

Eso y otras cosas que probablemente te hayas preguntado sobre tu mascota. Por ejemplo, por quأ© los perros inclinan la cabeza cuando les hablas, por quأ© los perros tienen los zoomies. آ؟Alguna vez te has preguntado por quأ© tu gato sigue tirando cosas de la mesa u otras superficies o por quأ© los gatos estأ،n tan aterrorizados por los pepinos? Todo eso y mأ،s, آ،mأ­ralo aquأ­! ًںگ¶ًںگ±ًںکچ

snippet.title: Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony (Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 ) - En Vivo
snippet.description:
Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony 
De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta - En Vivo 
(Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 )

Por primera vez juntos sobre un escenario Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony interpretan su أ©xito "De Vuelta Pa La Vuelta"

Desde diciembre de 2020 han encendido todas las plataformas digitales y emisoras radiales con un tema perfecto para pasarla bien con los tuyos desde casa. De la misma forma, en una presentaciأ³n llena de baile, colores y mucho tropicaleo los iconos mundiales de la mأ؛sica latina, Daddy Yankee y Marc Anthony ,lograron encender anoche la fiesta de Premio Lo Nuestro con su hit #1 en Tropical Airplay de Billboard â€œDe Vuelta Paâ€™ La Vueltaâ€‌. 

Haciendo vibrar el escenario, ambos artistas se compenetraron para regalarle al pأ؛blico presente y a toda su fanaticada, que disfrutأ³ desde casa, un show a la altura de dos leyendas globales de la mأ؛sica. La presentaciأ³n puso de pie a todos los presentes que se dispusieron a bailar el tema favorito de las fiestas. La presentaciأ³n contأ³ con un gran espectأ،culo de luces, un cuerpo de baile, orquesta en vivo y mucha sabrosura, lo que define el gأ©nero Tropical. Ademأ،s, Yankee sorprendiأ³ al pأ؛blico tocando el Piano Dorado como introducciأ³n a su presentaciأ³n magistral junto a Marc Anthony en "De Vuelta Pa' la Vuelta"; de igual forma, contأ³ con una actuaciأ³n magistral del aclamado pianista y productor puertorriqueأ±o, Sergio George. Definitivamente fue uno de los momentos mأ،s importantes y esperados de la noche ya que marcأ³ la historia: dos grandes juntos por primera vez sobre el mismo escenario y Yankee cantando y bailando una Salsa en vivo.

en.title: Daddy Yankee & Marc Anthony - De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta (Premio Lo Nuestro 2021) Live
en.description:
Daddy Yankee and Marc Anthony
De Vuelta Pa' La Vuelta - Live
Premio Lo Nuestro 2021 Awards

For the first time together on stage Daddy Yankee and Marc Anthony perform their hit "De Vuelta Pa La Vuelta"

Since December 2020 they have turned on all digital platforms and radio stations with a perfect theme to have fun with your friends and family at home. In the same way, in a presentation full of dance, colors and a lot of tropics, the world icons of Latin music, Daddy Yankee and Marc Anthony, managed to ignite Premio Lo Nuestro party last night with their # 1 hit on Billboard's Tropical Airplay â€œ De Vuelta Pa 'La Vuelta â€‌.

Making the stage vibrate, both artists joined in to give the audience and all their fans, who enjoyed the awards from home, a show at the height of two global music legends. The performance featured a great light show, an amazing dance group, live orchestra and a lot of flavor, which defines the Tropical genre. In addition, Yankee surprised the public by playing the Golden Piano as an introduction to his keynote presentation with Marc Anthony in "De Vuelta Pa 'la Vuelta"; likewise, it featured a masterful performance by the acclaimed Puerto Rican pianist and producer, Sergio George. It was definitely one of the most important and awaited moments of the night as it marked history: two greats together for the first time on the same stage and Yankee singing and dancing a live Salsa.

snippet.title: Mortal Kombat â€“ Trailer Oficial
snippet.description:
De New Line Cinema llega la nueva y explosiva aventura cinematogrأ،fica "Mortal Kombat", inspirada en la exitosa franquicia de videojuegos, que recientemente disfrutأ³ del lanzamiento de videojuegos mأ،s exitoso de su historia, Mortal Kombat 11. La pelأ­cula estأ، dirigida por el galardonado australiano. cineasta comercial Simon McQuoid, que marca su debut como director de largometraje, y producido por James Wan (pelأ­culas del universo â€œEl â€œConjuro, "Aquaman"), Todd Garner (â€œEn El Tornadoâ€‌, â€œآ،Te Atrapأ©!"), McQuoid y E. Bennett Walsh ("Hombres de Negro: Internacional", â€œEl Sorprendente Hombre Araأ±a 2: La Venganza de Electroâ€‌).

En â€œMortal Kombatâ€‌, el luchador de MMA Cole Young, acostumbrado a recibir una paliza por dinero, desconoce su herencia, o por quأ© el emperador Shang Tsung de Outworld ha enviado a su mejor guerrero, Sub-Zero, un Cryomancer de otro mundo, para cazar a Cole. Temiendo por la seguridad de su familia, Cole va en busca de Sonya Blade en direcciأ³n a Jax, un comandante de las Fuerzas Especiales que lleva el mismo dragأ³n extraأ±o con el que naciأ³ Cole. Pronto, se encuentra en el templo de Lord Raiden, un dios anciano y el protector de Earthrealm, que concede santuario a aquellos que llevan la marca. Aquأ­, Cole entrena con los experimentados guerreros Liu Kang, Kung Lao y el mercenario rebelde Kano, mientras se prepara para enfrentarse a los mayores campeones de la Tierra contra los enemigos de Outworld en una batalla de alto riesgo por el universo. Pero, آ؟Cole serأ، incitado lo suficientemente fuerte como para desbloquear sus arcanos, el inmenso poder desde dentro de su alma, a tiempo para salvar no solo a su familia, sino para detener Outworld de una vez por todas?

El diverso elenco internacional refleja la naturaleza global de la marca, con talento que abarca los mundos del cine, la televisiأ³n y las artes marciales. El elenco incluye a Lewis Tan ("Deadpool 2", "Wu Assassins" de Netflix) como Cole Young; Jessica McNamee (â€œMegadolأ³nâ€‌) como Sonya Blade; Josh Lawson (â€œEl â€œEscأ،ndalo) como Kano; Tadanobu Asano ("Midway: â€œAtaque en Altamar) como Lord Raiden; Mehcad Brooks ("Supergirl" serie de televisiأ³n) como Jackson "Jax" Bridges; Ludi Lin ("Aquaman") como Liu Kang; con Chin Han ("Rascacielos") como Shang Tsung; Joe Taslim ("Star Trek Sâ€‌in Lأ­mites) como Bi-Han y Sub-Zero; y Hiroyuki Sanada (â€œRascacielos) como Hanzo Hasashi y Scorpion. Tambiأ©n aparecen Max Huang como Kung Lao; Sisi Stringer como Mileena; Matilda Kimber como Emily Young; y Laura Brent como Allison Young.

McQuoid dirigido a partir de un guiأ³n de Greg Russo y Dave Callaham (â€œMujer Maravilla 1984â€‌), de una historia de Oren Uziel (â€œMortal Kombat: Rebirthâ€‌) y Russo, basado en el videojuego creado por Ed Boon y John Tobias. Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Jeremy Stein y Larry Kasanoff fueron los productores ejecutivos.
McQuoid llevأ³ la popular propiedad a la pantalla grande y dirigiأ³ un equipo de cineastas australianos y estadounidenses, incluido el director de fotografأ­a Germain McMicking ("True Detective", "Top of the Lake: China Girl"), el diseأ±ador de producciأ³n Naaman Marshall (â€œAmenaza en lo Profundoâ€‌, â€œServant"), los editores Dan Lebental ("Spider-Man: Lejos â€œde Casa) y Scott Gray ("Top of the Lake "," Daffodils "), el supervisor de efectos visuales Chris Godfrey ("Hacksaw Ridge") y vestuario diseأ±ador Cappi Ireland (â€œUn Camino a Casaâ€‌, â€œEl Cazador"). La mأ؛sica es de Benjamin Wallfisch (â€œBlade Runner 2049â€‌, las pelأ­culas de â€œITâ€‌).

New Line Cinema presenta una producciأ³n de Atomic Monster / Broken Road, "Mortal Kombat". La pelأ­cula se estrenarأ، en cines en 2021 y serأ، distribuida en todo el mundo por Warner Bros. Pictures.

snippet.title: Disney's Cruella | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Brilliant. Bad. A little bit mad. May 2021.

Academy Awardآ® winner Emma Stone (â€œLa La Landâ€‌) stars in Disneyâ€™s â€œCruella,â€‌ an all-new live-action feature film about the rebellious early days of one of cinemas most notorious â€“ and notoriously fashionable â€“ villains, the legendary Cruella de Vil. â€œCruella,â€‌ which is set in 1970s London amidst the punk rock revolution, follows a young grifter named Estella, a clever and creative girl determined to make a name for herself with her designs. She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estellaâ€™s flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscarآ® winner Emma Thompson (â€œHowards End,â€‌ â€œSense & Sensibilityâ€‌). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
آ 
Disneyâ€™s â€œCruellaâ€‌ is directed by Craig Gillespie (â€œI Tonyaâ€‌) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (â€œFreaky Fridayâ€‌), Marc Platt (â€œMary Poppins Returnsâ€‌) and Kristin Burr (â€œChristopher Robinâ€‌), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscarآ®- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (â€œMad Max: Fury Road,â€‌ â€œA Room with a Viewâ€‌) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on â€œCruella,â€‌ follow us on:

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DisneyCruellaDeVil
Twitter:آ https://twitter.com/cruella
Instagram:آ https://www.instagram.com/disneycruella
YouTube:https://youtube.com/disneymovietrailersâ€‹
Hashtag: #Cruella

She befriends a pair of young thieves who appreciate her appetite for mischief, and together they are able to build a life for themselves on the London streets. One day, Estellaâ€™s flair for fashion catches the eye of the Baroness von Hellman, a fashion legend who is devastatingly chic and terrifyingly haute, played by two-time Oscarآ® winner Emma Thompson (â€œHowards End,â€‌ â€œSense & Sensibilityâ€‌). But their relationship sets in motion a course of events and revelations that will cause Estella to embrace her wicked side and become the raucous, fashionable and revenge-bent Cruella.
آ 
Disneyâ€™s â€œCruellaâ€‌ is directed by Craig Gillespie (â€œI Tonyaâ€‌) from a screenplay by Dana Fox and Tony McNamara, story by Aline Brosh McKenna and Kelly Marcel & Steve Zissis. It was produced by Andrew Gunn (â€œFreaky Fridayâ€‌), Marc Platt (â€œMary Poppins Returnsâ€‌) and Kristin Burr (â€œChristopher Robinâ€‌), with Emma Stone, Michelle Wright, Jared LeBoff and Glenn Close serving as executive producers. Two-time Oscarآ®- winning costume designer Jenny Beavan (â€œMad Max: Fury Road,â€‌ â€œA Room with a Viewâ€‌) creates the dazzling and imaginative costumes, which take on a life of their own.

For more information on â€œCruella,â€‌ follow us on:

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32â€™ to tie at one and added two more in the 65â€™ and 85â€™. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70â€™ to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27â€™ by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them.

snippet.title: The Legend Of The Ice Hound (Clash Of Clans)
snippet.description:
Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter â–؛ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram â–؛https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook â–؛https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-آ­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...
